title: Cracking Some Bones
description: An addon for Werewolves mod so you can craft the cracked bones item in an unnecessarily complicated way.
body:
Are you tired from searching and hunting for skeletons in heavy modded modpacks and just want to crack your own bones? This mod allows you to craft these cracked bastards by taking unnececasry steps!

This mod adds:

-Cutting bone into segments.

-Smelting those segments to crack them.

-A bone glue to both glue the cracked segments and  fill your hunger. 

-A bone glue block to decorate your inner desires!

This mod is an addon for [https://modrinth.com/mod/werewolves](https://modrinth.com/mod/werewolves)

Feel free to suggest your ideas in the discord server.
